sample_note: ILLUSTRATIVE sample — no live week has been generated in this environment. Tiers, writeups and decision chains are produced by the REAL nflvalue.selector on hand-authored candidate inputs, to demonstrate the transparency UI. Numbers are not live picks.

picks.writeup: D.J. Moore over 64.5 receiving yards is selected because the model projects 55.0 and gives this side a 58% chance, against a 47% market-implied fair probability — a +11.0-point probability edge and +7.9% expected value at the best available price (1.86, dk). Projection basis: 7.03 expected opportunities × 8.5 efficiency, opponent-vs-position factor 0.92. The market probability is the de-vigged consensus across 4 book(s). Main risks: late injury/news can change availability.

decision_chain.detail: Projection: 7.03 expected opportunities × 8.5 per-opportunity efficiency × 0.92 opponent-vs-position factor → mean 55.0
Model P(over) = 58% vs de-vigged market fair 47% → edge +11.0 pts, EV +7.9% at best price
Tier STRONG — cleared the market-specific edge/EV bars
